APP_ENV.description: Use development for first DeployRocks boot; switch to production after setting real public URLs and email credentials.

SECRET_KEY.description: JWT signing secret. Replace in DeployRocks config before final defense.

JWT_REFRESH_SECRET_KEY.description: Refresh token signing secret. Replace in DeployRocks config before final defense.

CORS_ORIGINS.description: Comma-separated frontend origins allowed to call the API.

EMAIL_ENABLED.description: Set true after SENDGRID_API_KEY is configured.

EMAIL_PROVIDER.description: Email provider: gmail_oauth2 or sendgrid. Gmail OAuth2 is the working default — see GMAIL_OAUTH_* env vars set via DeployRocks UI (names with CREDENTIAL avoid auto-regeneration).

FROM_EMAIL.description: Fallback sender email address. Gmail OAuth flow uses GMAIL_SENDER_EMAIL instead.

FRONTEND_BASE_URL.description: Public frontend URL used in verification and password reset email links.

API_BASE_URL.description: Public API URL fallback used when FRONTEND_BASE_URL is not set.
